mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_EVENT_NO.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO EVENT (NO,PUBLIC_DATA_EVENT_NO, USER_ACCOUNT_NO, PRICE, RATING) VALUES (SEQ_EVENT_NO.NEXTVAL,#{publicDataEventNo}, #{userAccountNo}, #{price}, 3)
mapper.select:
SELECT e.NO AS eventNo, p.NAME AS eventName, SUM(CASE WHEN u.REGION = '서울' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS region_seoul, SUM(CASE WHEN u.REGION = '경기' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS region_gyeonggi, SUM(CASE WHEN u.REGION = '강원' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS region_gangwon, SUM(CASE WHEN u.REGION = '충북' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS region_chungbuk, SUM(CASE WHEN u.REGION = '충남' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS region_chungnam, SUM(CASE WHEN u.REGION = '전북' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS region_jeonbuk, SUM(CASE WHEN u.REGION = '전남' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS region_jeonnam, SUM(CASE WHEN u.REGION = '경북' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS region_gyeongbuk, SUM(CASE WHEN u.REGION = '경남' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS region_gyeongnam, SUM(CASE WHEN u.REGION = '제주' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS region_jeju,
AVG(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM u.BIRTH) BETWEEN 10 AND 19 THEN er.RATING END) AS rating_10s, AVG(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM u.BIRTH) BETWEEN 20 AND 29 THEN er.RATING END) AS rating_20s, AVG(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM u.BIRTH) BETWEEN 30 AND 39 THEN er.RATING END) AS rating_30s, AVG(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM u.BIRTH) BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN er.RATING END) AS rating_40s, AVG(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE) - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM u.BIRTH) >= 50 THEN er.RATING END) AS rating_50s,
COUNT(CASE WHEN r.QT BETWEEN 1 AND 10 THEN 1 END) AS booking_1_10, COUNT(CASE WHEN r.QT BETWEEN 11 AND 20 THEN 1 END) AS booking_11_20, COUNT(CASE WHEN r.QT BETWEEN 21 AND 30 THEN 1 END) AS booking_21_30, COUNT(CASE WHEN r.QT BETWEEN 31 AND 40 THEN 1 END) AS booking_31_40, COUNT(CASE WHEN r.QT BETWEEN 41 AND 50 THEN 1 END) AS booking_41_50
FROM EVENT e JOIN USER_MANAGEMENT_EVENT um ON e.PUBLIC_DATA_EVENT_NO = um.PUBLIC_DATA_EVENT_NO JOIN PUBLIC_DATA_EVENT p ON e.PUBLIC_DATA_EVENT_NO = p.NO LEFT JOIN RESERVED r ON e.NO = r.EVENT_NO LEFT JOIN USER_ACCOUNT u ON r.USER_ACCOUNT_NO = u.NO LEFT JOIN EVENT_REVIEW er ON e.NO = er.EVENT_NO LEFT JOIN USER_ACCOUNT ur ON er.USER_ACCOUNT_NO = ur.NO WHERE um.USER_ACCOUNT_NO = 1 GROUP BY e.NO, p.NAME
